generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, providing high‑resolution position (angle) measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox, providing post‑gearbox angular position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction (data transmitted)
instance MotorEncoderTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle of the vertical axis derived from MotorEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured post‑gearbox angle derived from GearboxEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current I_M from MotorCurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DerivedTorqueMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque τ_M for the motor, derived by analytical friction equations in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedTorqueGearwheelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque τ_G for the gearwheel, derived by analytical friction equations in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedTorqueAxisData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Overall axis torque τ_out, derived by analytical friction equations in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedVelocityMotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω_M for the motor, derived from encoder data in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedVelocityGearwheelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity ω_G for the gearwheel, derived from encoder data in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedVelocityAxisData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Overall axis angular velocity ω_out, derived in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment used to execute analytical friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and dynamic simulation of motor, gearwheel and gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that streams live sensor data (current, angle) from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) that integrates engineering and simulation models with the digital twin and propagates updated parameters to the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterUpdateService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard for real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for the block definition and internal block diagrams describing the axis, motor and gearboxes"
    // No direct services associated in this scenario
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured and simulated data in the dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction in the gearbox using Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation and propagation of updated friction parameters to improve model‑based robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentAction, PositioningAccuracyInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) for the gearbox"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot controller model‑based control algorithms using the newly derived friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PositioningAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reduced positioning errors and improved machining accuracy resulting from updated friction parameters"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual comparison of measured sensor traces and simulated model outputs"
]

// C10: Models (additional context)
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams representing the vertical axis, motor and gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor including analytical friction equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel gearbox with integrated friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox incorporating friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AnalyticalFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) used within the Simulink simulation environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of the asset (first axis), data sources (sensor streams via MQTT), processing components (simulation models that consume measured traces and produce simulated traces), and the purpose element (FrictionDerivation). The components are linked through the Digital Shadow Reference Model, providing traceability from raw data to processed results."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is instantiated during the operational phase of the robot to analyse friction, but it also incorporates engineering models (SysML structural model) created during design, thus spanning design and run‑time life‑cycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each DataTrace to its originating sensor or processing component, comparison of simulated friction‑free and friction‑including models against measured data, and the ability to continuously update white‑box and black‑box friction models to reflect wear, temperature and load changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the physical robot to the digital shadow over the MQTT protocol; processing components reside in the same network and access the data via the Asset Administration Shell interface."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital shadow follows the Digital Shadow Reference Model (UML class diagram) and conforms to the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for industrial assets; SysML is used according to its ISO/IEC standard."
]
